data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that multiple appointments are linked in a specific sequence (consult → procedure → follow-up). However, the evidence only confirms that a primary offer was booked, without any indication that the follow-up appointment is linked to the initial consultation or procedure. The absence of evidence showing the linkage of these appointments constitutes a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the follow-up appointment is linked to the initial consultation and procedure.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
